challengeTask: Use 'Would Like To' in 10 real situations today — in a conversation, WhatsApp message, email, or diary entry. Cover at least: 3 positive statements, 2 questions (Would you like to...?), 2 negatives (wouldn't like to), and 3 formal/office sentences.
hindiTask: आज 10 real situations में 'Would Like To' use करें — conversation में, WhatsApp message में, email में, या diary में। कम से कम: 3 positive statements, 2 questions (Would you like to...?), 2 negatives (wouldn't like to), और 3 formal/office sentences लिखें।
successCriteria: All 10 sentences use 'would like to' grammatically correctly
No sentence uses 'would likes to' or 'would like eating' (common mistakes avoided)
At least 2 question forms used: 'Would you like to...?'
At least 2 negative forms used: 'wouldn't like to / would not like to'
At least 3 sentences are in a professional/formal context (office, email, interview)
bonusChallenge: Write a 5-line professional email using 'would like to' at least 3 times — e.g., requesting a meeting, offering help, or introducing yourself to a new client.
